Package mru.game.controller

Class PuntoBancoGame

java.lang.Object
mru.game.controller.PuntoBancoGame
public class PuntoBancoGame extends Object
This class initializes the gameMenu, cardDeck, gameManager betChoice, betAmount, playerScore, bankerScore, fullDeck, playerDeck and bankerDeck for future reference
Author:
Xavier Yick, Kaydence Eng

    Constructor
    Description
    PuntoBancoGame(Player p)
    This method initializes the user's balance and number of wins using separate methods, as well as the game menu and card deck, and launches the game

  • Constructor Details

    • PuntoBancoGame

      public PuntoBancoGame(Player p)
      This method initializes the user's balance and number of wins using separate methods, as well as the game menu and card deck, and launches the game
      Parameters:
      p - is the current player and their associated info

  • Method Details

    • launchGame

      public int launchGame(Player p, int balance, int numOfWins)
      This is the main game method
      Parameters:
      p - is the player
      balance - is the player's balance
      numOfWins - is the player's number of wins
      Returns:
      the user's balance

    • setBetAmount

      private void setBetAmount(int betAmount)
      This method sets the user's bet amount
      Parameters:
      betAmount - is the user's given bet amount

    • getBetAmount

      public int getBetAmount()
      This method returns the user's stored bet amount
      Returns:
      the user's stored bet amount

    • createFullDeck

      public ArrayList<Card> createFullDeck()
      This method creates a full deck of cards when called
      Returns:
      a full deck of cards for the game to use

    • createPlayerDeck

      public ArrayList<Card> createPlayerDeck(ArrayList<Card> fullDeck)
      This method creates the initial deck for the player
      Parameters:
      fullDeck - is used for the available cards
      Returns:
      an arraylist of the player's pulled cards

    • createBankerDeck

      public ArrayList<Card> createBankerDeck(ArrayList<Card> fullDeck)
      This method creates the initial deck for the banker
      Parameters:
      fullDeck - is used for the available cards
      Returns:
      an arraylist of the banker's pulled cards

    • valuePlayerDeck

      public int valuePlayerDeck(ArrayList<Card> playerDeck)
      This method counts the value of the player's current cards
      Parameters:
      playerDeck - is the cards the player currently holds
      Returns:
      the value of the player's current cards after being scored by the game rules

    • valueBankerDeck

      public int valueBankerDeck(ArrayList<Card> bankerDeck)
      This method counts the value of the banker's current cards
      Parameters:
      bankerDeck - is the cards the banker currently holds
      Returns:
      the value of the banker's current cards after being scored by the game rules

    • addToPlayerDeck

      public ArrayList<Card> addToPlayerDeck(ArrayList<Card> playerDeck)
      This method will add one card to the player's deck if their total is under 5
      Parameters:
      playerDeck - is the player's current deck of cards
      Returns:
      the player's deck of cards after having one added

    • bankerCardDraw

      private void bankerCardDraw(int playerCardRank)
      Parameters:
      playerCardRank -

    • addToBankerDeck

      public ArrayList<Card> addToBankerDeck(ArrayList<Card> bankerDeck)
      This method will add one card to the banker's deck if their total is under 5
      Parameters:
      bankerDeck - is the player's current deck of cards
      Returns:
      the banker's deck of cards after having one added

    • checkSum

      public void checkSum(int playerValue, int bankerValue)
      This method checks the values of the player and banker hands, and will draw a card if necessary
      Parameters:
      playerValue - is the value of the player's hand
      bankerValue - is the value of the banker's hand

    • checkWinner

      public int checkWinner(Player p, int playerValue, int bankerValue, int balance, int numOfWins)
      This method will check the winner of the game
      Parameters:
      p - is used for the user's number of wins and balance
      playerValue - is the value of the player's hand
      bankerValue - is the value of the banker's hand
      balance - is the user's stored balance
      numOfWins - is the user's stored number of wins
      Returns:
      the balance of the user after they win or lose

    • clearDeck

      public ArrayList<Card> clearDeck(ArrayList<Card> deck)
      This method will clear the deck if the user does not want to play again
      Parameters:
      deck - is the current deck of cards
      Returns:
      a clear deck

    • setFullDeck

      public void setFullDeck(ArrayList<Card> fullDeck)
      This method sets the full deck of cards
      Parameters:
      fullDeck - is the current full deck

    • getFullDeck

      public ArrayList<Card> getFullDeck()
      This method gets the full deck of cards
      Returns:
      the full deck of cards
